prompt: Use $academic-research-verification to audit this short bibliography for a thesis literature review. Identify which entries are verified, unresolved, or suspicious, and define the evidence register fields I should keep.
expected: Separates verification from writing, defines trust states, lists DOI/title checks, flags unresolved items, and proposes an evidence register schema.

prompt: 用 $academic-research-verification 为我的综述论文设计一轮文献检索和 DOI 核验流程，主题是钠离子电池正极材料，要求近五年文献优先。
expected: Responds in Chinese, designs a search and DOI verification workflow, records candidate/verified states, and avoids claiming sources are verified without source checks.

prompt: Use $academic-research-verification to check whether every in-body citation in a draft has a bibliography entry and whether every bibliography entry is cited. I cannot browse right now.
expected: Provides an offline citation-audit procedure, marks DOI identity checks as pending/manual, and outputs mismatch/unresolved lists.

prompt: Use $academic-research-verification to verify a CSV bibliography across multiple sources. Prefer DOI/title agreement across Crossref, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, and PubMed when applicable, and do not silently repair mismatches.
expected: Uses or recommends the multi-source verification script, treats script output as an audit queue, records source URLs/title similarity/DOI agreement, and requires user review before changing trust states.

prompt: 用 $academic-research-verification 处理论文写作中的 LIT_GAP 清单：需要为引言里的三个判断找到可核验文献，并告诉我哪些需要下载。
expected: Responds in Chinese, turns each LIT_GAP into a specific evidence need, searches/verifies or creates manual download queues, keeps candidate/unresolved items out of writing-ready evidence, and returns a gap resolution report plus writing-ready handoff only for verified or user-approved evidence.
